B

BaseJsonProcessor - Class in pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic
The base JSON processor.

Constructor that sets up the Jackson ObjectMapper.

E

ExcludeKeysDecorator - Class in pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic
Decorator that removes specific keys from JSON objects.
ExcludeKeysDecorator(JsonProcessor, String[]) - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.ExcludeKeysDecorator
Sets up the exclude keys decorator.

F

FilterKeysDecorator - Class in pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic
Decorator that keeps only specified keys in JSON objects.
FilterKeysDecorator(JsonProcessor, String[]) - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.FilterKeysDecorator
Sets up the filter keys decorator.

J

JsonDecorator - Class in pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic
Base decorator class.
JsonDecorator(JsonProcessor) - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.JsonDecorator
Wraps the given processor.
JsonProcessor - Interface in pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic
Base interface for processing JSON strings.

Spring REST controller for JSON tools.

Decorator that minifies JSON.

PrettyPrintDecorator - Class in pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic
Decorator that pretty-prints JSON.
PrettyPrintDecorator(JsonProcessor) - Constructor for class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.PrettyPrintDecorator
Wraps a processor with the pretty-print decorator.
process(String) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.BaseJsonProcessor
Checks if input JSON is valid.
process(String) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.ExcludeKeysDecorator
Processes JSON, deleting targeted keys.
process(String) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.FilterKeysDecorator
Processes JSON, keeping only target keys.
process(String) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.JsonDecorator
Passes the processing call to the wrapped processor.
process(String) - Method in interface pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.JsonProcessor
Takes a JSON string and applies a transformation.
process(String) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.MinifyDecorator
Validates input JSON first, then minifies it.
process(String) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.PrettyPrintDecorator
Validates input JSON first, then pretty-prints it.
processJson(String, String[], String[]) - Method in class pl.put.poznan.transformer.rest.JsonToolsController
POST endpoint that processes JSON.
processor - Variable in class pl.put.poznan.transformer.logic.JsonDecorator
The nested processor we are decorating.

Main application class that starts the Spring Boot server.
